427427.name: pop_nondem_bmr_owid
427427.description: The variable denotes the number of people living in non-democracies based on the classification by Boix et al. (2013).

source.name: Political regimes - OWID based on Boix et al. (2013)
source.dataPublishedBy: Our World in Data, Bastian Herre
source.dataPublisherSource: Data comes from Boix et al. (2013), with own expansions and refinements.
source.additionalInfo:
This dataset provides information on political regimes, using data from Boix et al. (2013).

We slightly expand the countries and years covered.

You can download the code and complete dataset, including supplementary variables, from GitHub: https://github.com/owid/notebooks/tree/main/BastianHerre/political_regimes

427428.name: pop_dem_bmr_owid
427428.description: The variable denotes the number of people living in democracies based on the classification by Boix et al. (2013).

427429.name: pop_missreg_bmr_owid
427429.description: The variable denotes the number of people living in countries without regime data, based on the classification by Boix et al. (2013).
